creator: mpp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Wolfgang Helbig wrote:
> 
> >Description:
> 
> 	Removal of two unused fields in the structure fs breaks
> 	compilation of dumpfs.
  
The patch should print out the new field that was added, and
not just simply remove the two fields that no longer exist.

[patch removed]
